# Linux
PROS:
not windows
    more compatiable with shell stuff
    more customizable
    better wm
    can look like windows 98
    cool terminal email?


CONS:
    no ms office / keynote 
    dealing with dmenu (find alternative? or customize)
    fan noise

# Mac OS
PROS:
not windows
    cool techy aesthetic
    more modern
    battery life
    keynote / ms office
    integration with calendar and email (can probably figure out on linux)
    quiet fans

CONS:
    unreliable (might not boot lol)
    might not be sustainable (M1 chip)
    *shitty key binds / caps lock issues*
    sleep issues with usb wifi (unreliable wifi)
